name: Black Hole Simulation with Python
short_description: Play as a black hole, consuming stars to grow! Then, program your cosmic entity while mastering Python, C++, AWS, and Terraform. Designed for total accessibility with advanced low-vision support. From celestial physics to cloud engineering, code your universe. Your journey starts here!
detailed_description:
Embark on an extraordinary journey with CodeBound, where cosmic power meets code mastery. Begin your odyssey as a nascent black hole, growing in mass by consuming stars and solving physics-based puzzles to unravel the mysteries of the universe. This unique gameplay introduces fundamental logical thinking and problem-solving skills in an intuitive, engaging way.

As your cosmic entity expands, transition from manipulating celestial bodies to manipulating code. Our curriculum guides you from game mechanics into professional programming. Learn Python to automate tasks and script behaviors, and delve into C++ to understand the deep mechanics of high-performance systems.

Elevate your creations to the cloud by mastering AWS for scalable infrastructure, using Terraform to deploy environments as code, and implementing CI/CD pipelines for seamless development.

Built for true inclusion, CodeBridge ensures that players with disabilities have the tools to succeed. The game features extensive accessibility options specifically designed for low-vision users, including high-contrast modes, scalable UI, and full screen-reader compatibility. With support for diverse input methods and assistive technologies, we are breaking down barriers to entry. From controlling a black hole to commanding the cloud, your future in technology starts here.
